mapper.select: SELECT cwm.id, cwm.message_id AS messageId, cwm.sender_id AS senderId, u.username AS senderName, u.avatar AS senderAvatar, cwm.content_type AS contentType, cwm.content, cwm.original_content AS originalContent, cwm.file_url AS fileUrl, cwm.extra_data AS extraData, cwm.status, cwm.is_deleted AS isDeleted, cwm.is_filtered AS isFiltered, cwm.filtered_words AS filteredWords, cwm.withdraw_time AS withdrawTime, cwm.withdraw_reason AS withdrawReason, cwm.create_time AS createTime, cwm.update_time AS updateTime FROM chat_world_message cwm LEFT JOIN user u ON cwm.sender_id = u.id WHERE cwm.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cwm.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
